category_sources: source_facts.description says open source test framework for acceptance testing; official GitHub README describes Robot Framework as an automation framework for acceptance testing, ATDD, and RPA.
display_name_sources: Official docs heading and official GitHub README use Robot Framework; source_facts.name is robot-framework.
docs_sources: Official docs.robotframework.org links to Guides, User Guide, Standard Library, and API Documentation; official GitHub README lists these documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub README states the Robot Framework project is hosted on GitHub and links to robotframework/robotframework.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify acceptance testing, ATDD, RPA, Python implementation, and robot/rebot command-line tools.
